name: HHV6_U94_REP_homolog
description: HHV-6 U94 gene encoding a parvovirus REP-homologous protein (the only Rep-like gene in any herpesvirus, acquired by horizontal gene transfer from an AAV-like ancestor). Required for chromosomal integration at the telomere and for maintenance of latency; binds ssDNA, has helicase activity, and represses lytic gene expression. Unique to HHV-6A/B and HHV-7. Sequence identity HHV-6A/B ~95% — useful PSV target for species discrimination in clinical samples.
